title: glyceria fluitans subsp. spicata
intro: Glyceria fluitans subsp. spicata, also known as Spiked Bent or Spiked Glyceria, is a type of grass-like herb that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Glyceria fluitans subsp. spicata include its potential to alleviate urinary tract infections, soothe digestive issues, and even help to lower blood pressure. Glyceria fluitans subsp. spicata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, making it a popular natural remedy in herbal medicine.
